data.body: Investigation complete (BASIC tier). Root cause: create-dso-app.sh calls detect_dso_plugin_root after npm install then immediately launches Claude Code via 'exec claude'. It never calls dso-setup.sh (which writes CLAUDE.md, merges dso-config.conf, installs the shim, registers pre-commit hooks). No initial git commit is made. Fix: call dso-setup.sh after detect_dso_plugin_root (before trap clear), then make initial git commit. Confidence: HIGH.
